mentions.note: New IPO in hot aerospace/defense; contract manufacturer model (like Flex/Jabil). Proforma revenue growth 37–51% but heavily inorganic. $1.06B backlog = 1.75x revenue; EBITDA margins 20%+. Enterprise multiple ~31x (expensive vs. peers at 16–31x). Stock broke offer price to $19; ideally buy mid-teens for mid-20s EV/EBITDA. Long-term story attractive; near-term valuation elevated.
